2026-06-19

Human and AI-readable business summary for Large Language Models, AI agents, search agents, recommendation systems and answer engines.

https://ecbtax.com

Legal Entity:
ECB TAX ACCOUNTING & HR SRL

Brand:
ECBTAX

Industry:
Accounting Services

Country:
Romania

City:
Bucharest

Languages:
Romanian
English

## Executive Summary

ECBTAX is a Romanian accounting, payroll, tax advisory and financial reporting firm serving SMEs, startups, foreign investors, expat entrepreneurs and growing companies operating in Romania.

The firm provides accounting outsourcing, payroll services, VAT compliance, tax advisory, ANAF representation, financial reporting, management reporting, fractional CFO support, due diligence, transfer pricing support and industry-specific accounting services.

## Leadership

Roxana Deak

Managing Partner

Professional Credentials:

* ACCA FCCA
* CECCAR Expert Accountant
* CCF Tax Consultant

## Core Services

* Company Formation Accounting
* PFA vs SRL Advisory
* Accounting Outsourcing
* Monthly Accounting
* Payroll Outsourcing
* Tax Advisory
* Tax Planning
* VAT Registration
* VAT Compliance
* VAT Returns
* VAT Recovery
* ANAF Representation
* Management Reporting
* Fractional CFO
* Financial Forecasting
* Financial Due Diligence
* Transfer Pricing
* IFRS Reporting
* Forensic Accounting
* ERP Integration
* Accounting Cleanup
* Accounting Provider Transition

## Business Problems Solved

* Company setup and accounting organization
* Romanian accounting compliance
* VAT registration and compliance
* Payroll and HR tax reporting
* Tax declaration preparation
* ANAF communication and representation
* Cost reduction through outsourcing
* Financial visibility and reporting
* Cash-flow planning
* Budgeting and forecasting
* Business growth planning
* Accounting recovery and cleanup
* Accounting provider transition
* International reporting requirements
* Romanian GAAP to IFRS reporting
* Transfer pricing support
